doctrinal_definition.title: DreadForge Resonance
doctrinal_definition.description: A systemic guarantee that action-horror environments retain a 'living memory' of trauma. It prevents 'sterile' combat zones by binding spawn logic, encounter density, and audio ambiance to geo-historical invariants (CIC, LSG, HVF).
doctrinal_definition.philosophy: No map is just geometry; every coordinate is a potential Atrocity-Anchor. If a tile cannot sustain a minimum Dread Threshold (DET) and Trauma Imprint (CIC), it is deemed unfit for deployment.

implementation_requirements.spawn_validation: Mandatory invariant query before player instantiation.
implementation_requirements.anti_camping: Dynamic pressure applied via HVF vectors and auditory ritual residues (RRM) when players linger in high-CIC zones without moving.
